# Project Packaging

## Responsibility

Maintains package metadata, console script entrypoints, deploy recipes, Docker files, installer scripts, and companion package wiring.

## Current Evidence

`pyproject.toml` declares the main Python package, optional dependencies, console scripts, frontend package data, and the `jiuwenbox` package-dir mapping.

## Pending

Packaging, deploy, Docker, installer, and companion TUI package slices are not yet documented beyond this initial map.
